ik:product.dc:title: NORDEN
ik:product.dc:description: This classic gateleg table combines a centuries-old, space-saving design with a clean look, making it an ideal choice for homes where space is limited. Featuring convenient drop-leaves, it easily adjusts to seat two to four people according to your needs, while six integrated drawers beneath the tabletop offer smart storage for cutlery, napkins, and candles. It is rigorously tested for stability and safety to withstand years of everyday indoor use.
ik:product.ik:multifunction: The space-saving gateleg design provides a highly versatile, multi-functional solution, allowing it to be freely transformed according to your needs. It functions perfectly as a compact console table when fully folded, a cozy 2-seat dining table with one leaf raised, or an expanded 4-seat dining and working station when fully opened—all while offering smart storage with its 6 integrated drawers.
